# Modonty — Full Documentation

> Modonty (مودونتي) is a bilingual Arabic-first content platform and business directory focused on Saudi Arabia and Egypt. We publish SEO-optimized articles and detailed business profiles for Arabic-speaking audiences.

## Platform Overview

Modonty is built for the Arabic-speaking market with a focus on Saudi Arabia (ar-SA) and Egypt (ar-EG). The platform connects businesses with readers through high-quality content, structured data, and industry-specific classification.

### Key Features
- Business directory with detailed client profiles (Organization, LocalBusiness)
- SEO-optimized articles with rich structured data (Article, FAQPage, Person)
- Category and tag-based content organization
- Industry-specific content classification
- FAQ system with community feedback (upvote/downvote)
- Newsletter subscription system
- Multi-tier subscription plans for businesses
- Contact messaging system
- Social media integration

### Technology
- Built with Next.js (App Router), React, TypeScript
- MongoDB database with Prisma ORM
- Cloudinary for media management
- Full JSON-LD structured data on every public page
- Sitemap with dynamic URLs from database
- RTL-first responsive design with Tailwind CSS

## Content Types

### Articles
Articles are the core content type. Each article includes:
- Title, excerpt, and full body content
- Featured image with alt text
- Author (Person schema with credentials)
- Category and tags classification
- Industry association
- Client (business) association
- SEO metadata: title, description, canonical URL
- JSON-LD: Article + FAQPage (when article has FAQ) + BreadcrumbList + Person + Organization
- Publication date, modification date
- Reading time, word count
- Social sharing: OpenGraph + Twitter Cards

URL pattern: `/clients/[client-slug]/articles/[article-slug]`

### Business Profiles (Clients)
Each business profile includes:
- Name, legal name, alternate name, slogan
- Description and business brief
- Logo, OG image, Twitter image
- Contact: email, phone, contact type, working hours
- Address: street, city, region, country (ISO 3166-1), postal code
- Geo: latitude, longitude (GeoCoordinates)
- Social profiles: Facebook, Twitter/X, LinkedIn, Instagram, YouTube, TikTok, Pinterest, Snapchat
- Industry classification with ISIC v4 codes
- Saudi identifiers: Commercial Registration, VAT ID, Tax ID
- Google Business Profile: URL and Place ID
- Opening hours (OpeningHoursSpecification)
- Price range
- Number of employees
- Parent organization relationship
- JSON-LD: Organization/LocalBusiness + ContactPoint + PostalAddress + GeoCoordinates + BreadcrumbList

URL pattern: `/clients/[slug]`
Sub-pages: `/about`, `/reviews`, `/photos`, `/contact`, `/followers`, `/likes`, `/reels`, `/mentions`

### Categories
Content categories for organizing articles. Each category includes:
- Name, slug, description
- Parent-child hierarchy (tree structure)
- SEO metadata and social image
- JSON-LD: DefinedTerm + CollectionPage + BreadcrumbList

URL pattern: `/categories/[slug]`

### Tags
Content tags for cross-cutting topics. Each tag includes:
- Name, slug, description
- SEO metadata and social image
- JSON-LD: CollectionPage + ItemList + BreadcrumbList

### Industries
Business industry classification. Each industry includes:
- Name, slug, description
- Associated clients
- SEO metadata and social image
- JSON-LD: CollectionPage + ItemList + BreadcrumbList

### FAQ
Frequently asked questions with community feedback:
- Question and answer pairs
- Category grouping
- Upvote/downvote system
- Last reviewed date
- JSON-LD: FAQPage + Question/Answer + SpeakableSpecification

URL: `/help/faq`

## Structured Data Implementation

Every public page includes JSON-LD structured data following schema.org specifications:

| Page Type | Schema Types |
|-----------|-------------|
| Homepage | WebSite + Organization + WebPage + SearchAction |
| About | AboutPage + Organization + BreadcrumbList |
| Contact | ContactPage + BreadcrumbList |
| Categories listing | CollectionPage + ItemList |
| Category detail | DefinedTerm + CollectionPage + BreadcrumbList |
| Clients listing | CollectionPage + ItemList |
| Client detail | Organization/LocalBusiness + ContactPoint + GeoCoordinates + BreadcrumbList |
| Article | Article + FAQPage + BreadcrumbList + Person + Organization |
| FAQ | FAQPage + Question/Answer + SpeakableSpecification |
| Trending | CollectionPage + ItemList |
| User Profile | Person + ProfilePage |

## Geographic Focus

- Primary market: Saudi Arabia (ar-SA)
- Secondary market: Egypt (ar-EG)
- Address format: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country codes
- Currency: SAR (Saudi Riyal), EGP (Egyptian Pound)
- Organization schema includes: areaServed, addressCountry, GeoCoordinates
- Google Business Profile integration for local businesses

## API and Technical Details

- Sitemap: Dynamic XML sitemap at `/sitemap.xml` including all published articles, clients, and categories
- Robots: `/robots.txt` with AI search bot allowances and training bot restrictions
- Authentication: NextAuth with session-based auth
- Media: Cloudinary CDN with automatic optimization (f_auto, q_auto)
- Caching: Next.js cache tags with cross-app revalidation (admin changes trigger modonty cache refresh)

## Contact

- Website: https://modonty.com
- Content Language: Arabic (ar-SA primary, ar-EG secondary)
